stemHtml: During refuelling, an earthing cable is fitted to an aircraft even if the tyres are electrically conductive. Why is this done?

options.a: To equalise charge between the aircraft and earth using a low resistance cable.
options.b: To equalise charge between the aircraft and Earth using a high resistance cable.
options.c: To equalise charge between the positively charged aircraft and the negatively charged Earth.
options.d: To equalise charge between the negatively charged aircraft and the positively charged Earth using a low resistance cable.
